entity.summary: Avalanche automated-market-maker and decentralized investment platform built around Balancer-style weighted pools, token swaps, liquidity provision, farming, and protocol-fee incentives.
entity.notes: The current root domain still contains historical Embr AMM and swap copy but is heavily mixed with unrelated gambling/casino SEO links. The former app subdomain redirects into the same repurposed site. HEI therefore classifies Embr Finance as inactive, not dead, and marks the original domain repurposed pending stronger terminal-state evidence.

evidence.title: Embr Finance historical product surface on current domain
evidence.notes: Current domain still contains historical first-party Embr descriptions of Balancer V2-based AMM trading, swaps, weighted pools, farming, liquidity, and protocol-fee incentives, but the page is also heavily contaminated with unrelated casino and gambling links.

evidence.title: Embr application redirect state
evidence.notes: Former first-party application subdomain redirects into the repurposed Embr domain and no clean live exchange surface was verified, supporting inactive rather than active classification.

evidence.title: Embr Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Embr Finance as an Avalanche decentralized exchange; HEI uses current first-party domain state as the authority for inactive classification.
